# WIECODES Loading Screen

## Overview
A cinematic, purely black-background loading screen featuring a seamless 12-second 3D rotation of the WIECODES logo. Built using standard web technologies (React, TailwindCSS, CSS animations) to simulate a medium-thick luxury titanium aesthetic.

## Recent Changes
- Reduced 3D thickness (15 layers instead of 60) for a cleaner balance.
- Scaled up the logo to ~35% of the viewport width.
- Introduced a background gradient spotlight and an animated gradient shine passing over the front face.

## Maintenance Rules
- Check and update this README whenever significant architectural or functional changes are introduced to the project.
